('LIDER SOM',               '1917431909', 'lider-som',                'ativo', 0, 0, NOW(), NOW()),
('CSR PARTS',               '1229968748', 'csr-parts',                'ativo', 0, 0, NOW(), NOW()),

SELECT id, nome, seller_id, loja_ml, status FROM clientes ORDER BY id;
